prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9841fdad`.
codex_response:
Implemented `9841fdad` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: detect the framed left panel, extract its non-background horizontal motifs, and redraw them into the right panel on the same rows while preserving their horizontal anchoring; left-flush stays left, right-flush stays right, and full inner-width bars expand across the full inner width. The summary hint was used, since it matched all official examples; no `notes.md` was needed. No reusable primitive was added to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`; I kept the projection logic task-local in `helpers.py`.

Verification is clean: official examples `3/3` passed, generated examples `1000/1000` passed, and I visually checked `[preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9841fdad/previews/preview_01.png)` against the task family.
